name: Cameco Corporation
content: Cameco is one of the world's largest global providers of uranium fuel and nuclear fuel services. The company operates high-grade uranium mines in Canada (McArthur River and Cigar Lake) and has a significant stake in the Westinghouse Electric Company, a leading nuclear services provider. Cameco is a foundational anchor for the nuclear renaissance, offering integrated solutions across the entire fuel cycle to meet the growing global demand for carbon-free baseload power.
